5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch

10 PVC Split Jerk
10 Strict Press

hypertrophy.reasoning: Target posterior chain and arm pull muscles to balance pushing/leg volume while managing CNS fatigue.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 3 at 70 percent. Metcon: Partner Angie. Workout: Partner Angie, You-go-I-Go, 100 Pull Ups, 100 Push Ups, 100 Sit Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, biceps, back.
